B

battle(GameFrame, BattleView, List<EnemyPanel>, Player, JButton[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EncounterSystem
Configures the battle actions and registers their event listeners.
BATTLE - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GameFrame
Identifier for the battle screen.
BattleMenuPanel - Klasse in view.battle
UI panel representing the battle action menu.
BattleMenuPanel(Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.battle.BattleMenuPanel
Constructs the battle menu panel and initializes UI components.
BattleView - Klasse in view.battle
The main view for a battle scene.
BattleView(Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.battle.BattleView
Creates a new battle view.
